fixed-threat-target.description: Stationary or semi-stationary targets that must be cleared or suppressed.

dynamic-threat.description: Moving enemies that can collide with or shoot the player.

pickup.description: Weapon or reward item. It must not trigger avoidance by itself.

progression-barrier-node.description: Object that blocks stage completion until destroyed or bypassed.

high-value-component.description: Boss or defense part with higher tactical value.

environment-hazard.description: Terrain or stage hazard such as pit, water, bridge, or explosion zone.

non-combat-visual.description: Explosion, animation, empty slot, or other non-hostile object.

notes: Concrete type values are still under verification and must not be treated as final validation data.
Danger detection must classify entity slots before avoidance decisions.
